summary: Iteration 3 — Tested Quick Compare, pitch variants, kamdhenu_advantage flag, green highlighting, angle chips, Try Another Angle, and April 2026 footnote. Backend: 6/6 new tests pass (kamdhenu_advantage on every row, variant 1 durability keywords, variant 2 safety/economics keywords, variant 0 vs 1 differ proving cache key includes variant, real-world problem keywords present, default variant). Frontend: dashboard shows both CTAs; Quick Compare flow K80 → expand MYK Laticrete → pick product → Compare K80 vs 1 Product enables; comparison screen renders 21 green-success cells (rgb 15,138,95); angle chip 'Default Angle' on load; tap regen-pitch-0 → angle chip switches to 'Durability', pitch lines change (verified via DOM diff); footnote contains 'April 2026', 'Kamdhenu advantage' legend, and green outperform explanation. Real GPT-5.2 lines reference real-world problems: 'Bathrooms/pools debonding', 'Freeze-thaw pop-outs', 'Wet-area debonding', 'Heat aging on sun-hit facades'.

minor.issue: (Carryover from iter2) Deterministic fallback path on LLM budget-exceeded does cache (good), but no 'source: ai|fallback' field returned to UI. Non-blocking.

issues: Console warning persists: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — non-blocking carryover from prior iterations.

action_items: (Optional) Migrate deprecated pointerEvents prop to style.pointerEvents.
(Optional) Return 'source: ai|fallback' in /api/pitch response for UI transparency.
critical_code_review_comments: comparison.tsx regeneratePitch reuses cached responses correctly — variant N+1 is sent each tap, so consecutive taps cycle Default → Durability → Safety & Economics → Premium → Standards Gap → Default. Good UX.
quick-compare.tsx: total counter recomputes on every render (Object.values(selected).filter — fine at this scale).

server.py PARAM_DIRECTIONS uses parameter name match; if seed_data renames a param string the kamdhenu_advantage flag silently goes false. Consider unit tests on seed_data param keys (not done in this run).
_extract_max_number / _extract_min_number ignore unit prefixes ≥ ≤ — safe for current dataset but could mis-rank if a competitor lists '≥1.0' vs Kamdhenu '1.25-1.35' (works correctly here).
seed_data_creation: None. Used dev_session_kamdhenu_2026 (auto-seeded). Pitch cache populated organically.
context_for_next_testing_agent: To exercise Quick Compare without auth boilerplate: localStorage.setItem('session_token','dev_session_kamdhenu_2026') then navigate /dashboard → tap quick-compare-btn → qc-kam-K80 → qc-brand-myk_laticrete → qc-prod-myk_laticrete::0 → qc-compare-btn → comparison screen. Angle chip cycles via testID regen-pitch-0; ANGLE_LABELS in comparison.tsx defines the 5 labels. Green highlight uses COLORS.success #0F8A5F (rgb 15,138,95). Backend cache key for /api/pitch includes |varN — verified by test_pitch_variant_0_vs_1_differ.
rca_of_issue: No bugs. All Iteration 3 acceptance criteria met end-to-end.
